title: Delinquent Hamsters
overview: Regent’s sunflower seeds have gone missing. Mohawk’s cheeks are suspiciously large. You do the math.

title: Turf War
overview: Mohawk has claimed the sleeping hut as his own, but Regent ain’t gonna take that lying down… because he wants to lie down in that hut, dammit!

title: Tall Tales
overview: It’s time to decide, once and for all, who’s the most hardcore delinquent around.

title: Lady Friend!
overview: Mohawk and Regent have a way with the ~ladies~.

title: Introducing Kohai
overview: There’s a new hamster in town. He’s got a great perm, but it takes more than a punky haircut to be a delinquent. Regent and Mohawk gotta take this ‘kohai’ under their wing…

title: Delinquent Hamsters Kablam!
overview: History repeats itself… only this time Kohai is along for the sunflower-seed-covered ride.

title: Dusty Bro
overview: What the hell is that pink thing??

title: Showdown
overview: The hamsters shove sunflower seeds into their mouths to see who’s most delinquent. Yes, that makes perfect sense. SHUT UP.

title: A Battle for Freedom
overview: Playtime’s over, and the delinquent hamsters mean business — because they want more freakin’ playtime!

title: A Good Night's Sleep
overview: The delinquents’ sleeping arrangements get a major upgrade. Chaos ensues. I mean, what’d you expect? For the hamsters to just get along or whatever? HA HA HA… no.

title: Youthful Indiscretion
overview: Kohai climbs to new heights. And then he can’t figure out how to get down again. WHOOPS.

title: Impact
overview: Hamsters are definitely the most impressive animals around, right? Right?? … RIGHT?!?!!

title: The Cushion
overview: Do not underestimate the powers of the cushion. Not even delinquents are immune to its sorcery!

title: The Uninvited Guest
overview: GET OFF OUR TURF YOU STUPID PIGEON.

title: The New Toy
overview: Regent has a …special… way of claiming a carboard tube as his own. Ewwwwwww.

title: Youthful Indiscretion 2
overview: Kohai plummets to new depths. And then he can’t figure out how to climb out again. How the hell does he keep getting himself into these situations??!

title: Individuality
overview: Kiyomasa comes calling. He needs advice from the delinquents. It goes about as well as you’d expect from a show like this.

title: Mystery Object X
overview: What the heck is that wheel thing??

title: The Brown Stadium
overview: The delinquents acquire a clubhouse. Chaos ensues. What, you’re surprised? You really need to stop expecting better of these hamsters, dude.

title: The Cherry Incident
overview: The delinquents try a new food. They… like it? Maybe? It’s hard to tell, honestly.

title: Operation Baked Potato
overview: Operation Sweet Potato is underway, and (predictably) Kohai gets the short end of the stick… er, potato? Spit-covered tissue bridge? Maybe? Something like that.

title: Battle at the Window
overview: DIDN’T WE SCARE YOU OFF LAST TIME??? UGH! GO THE HECK AWAY, YOU STUPID PIGEON!!!

title: Butt Kicking
overview: Temperature control in the sleeping hut is Serious Business for delinquents.

title: The Brown Stadium 2
overview: The delinquents find another clubhouse. We’ll give you three guesses as to how that goes, and the first two don’t count.

title: The Call of the Cushion
overview: Man, that cushion really messes up the delinquents’ image, doesn’t it? But it’s just so soooooft…

title: Samurai Hamster
overview: Kiyomasa returns for more advice, against all odds and his own best interest.

title: The Missing Treats
overview: Kohai reveals an innovative method of storing food… very familiar-looking food… HEY, WAIT A MINUTE —

title: Fluffy Rapper
overview: THE HAMSTERS RAP. The hamsters rap in this episode; what else is there to say?? They’re hamsters and they rap.

title: Tummy Crisis
overview: Mohawk has a tummy ache. Regent and Kohai rush to the rescue. Delinquents take care of their own!

title: Bob Cuts By the Window
overview: WHAT THE?! THE PIGEON IS BACK AGAIN?!? OH, THAT DOES IT. TIME TO BRING OUT THE BIG GUNS (and maybe the bob haircuts, though hopefully things won’t come to that).

title: Dreams of Bobs
overview: Wait. What happened to everybody’s hair? And why is everybody acting weird?! WHAT IS HAPPENING???!

title: Butt Kicking
overview: Temperature control in the sleeping hut is still Serious Business for delinquents.

title: Operation Melon
overview: Operation Melon is underway, but this time Kohai won’t let Regent and Pompadour make a fool of him!

title: Ultra Humidity
overview: Hot weather leads to a hair disaster for the delinquents. Especially Regent and Mohawk.

title: Midnight Escape
overview: The hamsters go for a midnight stroll. Let’s just hope their shenanigans don’t wake Kinkuma…

title: Delinquent Dreams
overview: Kohai can’t sleep. Luckily Regent and Pompadour are having some very entertaining dreams. Where’s the popcorn when you need it…

title: A Delinquent Election
overview: The delinquents need a leader, so they host an election. Too bad they’re really bad at math…

title: Tale of Two Cookies
overview: Two cookies. Three hamsters. The delinquents aren’t great at math, but even they know those numbers don’t add up.

title: My Name
overview: Winter is coming. If they’re to survive, the delinquents must train their brains!

title: The Shaking Machine
overview: The delinquents discover a weird device. It rumbles… sometimes. Guess they gotta bide their time with a wordgame…

title: The Shogun Hamster
overview: There’s an interloper on the delinquents’ turf! Good thing gutsy Kiyomasa is there to back them up.

title: A Battle for Freedom - Winter
overview: Playtime’s over, but once again, the delinquents aren’t giving playtime up without a fight!

title: Christmas Eve Punks
overview: The delinquents receive a confusing Christmas present. Dude, it’s like looking in a mirror…

title: Delinquent Style
overview: “Delinquent.” What does it mean? And who’s that mysterious figure coming this way??

title: Gramps Style
overview: Gramps (a new, old friend) shares his wisdom with the delinquents. Will Regent, Mohawk and Kohai become delinquents once again?

title: A Plump Ham or Fat Kohai
overview: Kohai has gained weight. No big deal… except now he gets extra playtime. Regent and Mohawk hatch a plan to cash in on the fun…

title: Gourmet Musketeers
overview: Mohawk doesn’t appreciate snacktime the way that he should. Regent and Kohai investigate.

title: Side Parted Melancholy
overview: Regent has a bad hairday, with unexpectedly straitlaced results.

title: Valentine's Day Delusion
overview: The delinquents discuss the true meaning of Valentine’s Day.

title: Vacuum Bro
overview: What the hell is that loud thing??

title: His Name
overview: …what is Kohai’s real name, anyway?

title: Sneezing Fire
overview: Mohawk’s sneezing fit puts his very identity in danger! The delinquents jump into action, but can they save his signature haircut?

title: Show and Tell
overview: It’s time for the 19th Show and Tell with Namippo! Who will walk away the victor of this cutthroat competition?

title: An Important Hair
overview: Gramps lost his most precious hair! The delinquents are on the case and will replace it come hell or high water!

title: Spring Has Come
overview: The delinquents are graduating… but what are they graduating FROM, exactly?

title: Get Those Seeds!
overview: An insidious serpent has stolen the delinquents’ sunflower seeds. THIS WILL NOT STAND!

title: Kohai the Daydreamer
overview: Kohai has a dream. It’s weird. But then again, things are rarely ever normal with these hamsters. Better get used to it.

title: Specialty Planning
overview: Real delinquents build their own hideouts; everybody knows THAT! But not everybody has brains as small as these hamsters…

title: The Center Part
overview: Mohawk’s bed-head changes him. Or does it? Nobody’s sure. Maybe he’s just grumpy. Oh well.

title: Excalibur of Mine
overview: Kiyomasa is on a quest to find the perfect sword. He goes to the delinquents for help. Probably not the best decision he could’ve made, but you do you, samurai-hamster.

title: My Narrow Road
overview: Gramps introduces / senryu poetry form / to the delinquents

title: Their Name
overview: Regent is dead set on changing his name, but he’s going to need some time to adjust — and so will Mohawk and Kohai.

title: Playtime Crusade
overview: Yet again, the delinquents have hidden behind the tissue box in protest of a shortened playtime. Will Mohawk’s stinky breath save them where so many plans have failed before?

title: Rodents Got Talent
overview: The cure for boredom? Karaoke. It’s very delinquent.

title: N-1 Grand Prix
overview: The N-1 Grand Prix begins! …oh wait, you don’t know what that is. It’s a contest to make Namippo laugh. Yeah. That’s it.

title: We Young Hams
overview: Man, these hamsters’ voices don’t sound anything like they used to, do they? The delinquents take a walk down memory lane to see how much they’ve really changed…

title: Riddles
overview: The delinquents decide to PUNish their audience in the most heinous way possible. Truly, these are the most hardcore delinquents in the world.

title: Ultra Humidity Strikes Back
overview: Hot weather leads to a hair disaster for the delinquents. Especially Kohai.

title: Voice Swap
overview: Regent and Mohawk undergo a transformation that thoroughly confuses Kohai.

title: Smooth Bavarois
overview: Time to make a wish! But what should the delinquents wish for, anyhow?

title: Wondering Samurai
overview: Kiyomasa has a dark secret (one that isn’t really a secret at all, but don’t tell him that).

title: Hide and go Weep
overview: Gramps is a hide-and-seek champion and no one will ever find him (or at least these dummy delinquents won’t).

title: Playtime Defense
overview: The delinquents have come up with an ingenious new way to extend their playtime… but they’ve vastly overestimated their brilliance. Like, seriously.

title: Flight or Fright
overview: A nighttime escapade. That’s nothing a trio of delinquents can’t handle… b-but wh-what’s th-that sh-shadow o-over th-there?!?!?

title: The Kiwi Incident
overview: The delinquents try a new food. The process is just as dramatic as you’d expect.

title: Summer Sweat-off
overview: What the heck is this super hot spot?!?!

title: Mohawk the Daydreamer
overview: Mohawk’s hair soars to new heights as he dreams a really weird dream. Like, it’s seriously strange.

title: Delinquent 101
overview: Namippo is back, and he’s looking to take a Delinquency 101 class from the delinquents themselves.

title: Titles
overview: Regent wants to add a title to his name, but you can’t just give yourself a title. The delinquents will have to band together to think up something great!

title: Delinquent Autumn
overview: Regent and Mohawk have eaten all of Kohai’s snacks, and he’s out for revenge. Will Regent and Mohawk FALL for his tricks?

title: Ham-ham Tanka
overview: Forget senryu. Gramps is all about tanka poetry now! Hell yeah!

title: Another Delinquent Election
overview: Time for another round of elections! It’s Regent vs. Kohai, and Mohawk wields the power of the vote. FEAR MOHAWK’S INFINITE MIGHT AS A CONSTITUENT!!!

title: Halloween Dilemma
overview: Happy Halloween… but wait. What IS Halloween, exactly? Kiyomasa has the inside scoop.

title: Serious Cleaning
overview: The sleeping hut has gotten super cramped, so it’s time to do some tidying up. Can the delinquents bear to part with their stuff, though??

title: Getting Fit
overview: Any good delinquent needs some muscle, so the hamsters are gonna get J A C K E D.

title: Static Panic
overview: First humidity, and now this?!?!

title: In Search of Warmth
overview: What the heck is this super cold spot?!?!

title: Fine Lounging Weather
overview: Can’t… reach… COOKIE…

title: Smartphone Bro
overview: The rumbling thing is back! How come Regent gets to stand in the best spot?

title: Chris Moose is for Good Hams
overview: Chris Moose is upon us once again! It’s that time of year when Santa brings presents to good little hams, and the delinquents have been very… uh… um… UH OH.

title: A New Year
overview: Happy New Year! (Om nom nom.) It’s time to make some resolutions. (Om nom nom!) What do you think the delinquents will do this year? (OM NOM NOM!)

title: Delinquency Exam
overview: Does Kohai have what it takes to pass the Delinquency Exam? Wait. Do delinquents even take exams? THIS IS PARADOXICAL AND CONFUSING.

title: More Valentine's Day Delusions
overview: It’s Valentine’s Day, but what’re the delinquents supposed to do when there aren’t any girls around?

title: Delinquent 201
overview: Namippo is back for more delinquent lessons, and this time he’s here for a new hairdo… but with the delinquents for stylists, things are bound to get weird.

title: Sleep Shouting
overview: Regent wakes up early (for once) and discovers something interesting about Mohawk.

title: Spring Has Sprung!
overview: Ah, spring. The time for graduation and moving on… wait, why is Regent making it sound like this show is ending? But we have so many episodes left!!

title: Club Recruitment
overview: Kohai has a very important decision to make. Luckily Mohawk and Regent make it easy for him.

title: Better Treats
overview: The delinquents deserve better snacks, dammit, and they’ll have to pull out all the stops to get ‘em!

title: The Samurai and the Butterfly
overview: Well, great. This ding-dang butterfly just HAD to visit on the same day as Kiyomasa! Looks like the delinquents will have to scare the interloper off… by any means necessary.

title: Well-mannered Hamsters
overview: In celebration of our 100th episode, it’s “Well-mannered Hamsters!” Will the delinquents enjoy this new twist on an old fav? (Hint: Probably not.)

title: Summer Feelings
overview: Mohawk just wants to enjoy summer, dammit! Can the delinquents help him feel those good summer vibes?

title: The Call of the Banana
overview: Daddy brought bananas for the hams! But do bananas taste better now, or will they taste better later? Gramps has the inside scoop.

title: Take this Summer Greeting!
overview: What are midsummer check-ins all about, anyway? What even ARE they, really? And why the hell is Kohai so damn evil???

title: Delinquent Shopping
overview: But wait; there’s more! Now it’s time for… Delinquent Shopping!

title: Smartphone Bro 2
overview: Uh oh. Looks like the delinquents went and pissed off Smartphone Bro! But what have they done to make him so mad?

title: Samurai Blues
overview: Kiyomasa tries to talk some sense into the delinquents regarding their latest scheme. It backfires. It really, really backfires.

title: Rock, Paper, Scissors
overview: The delinquents decide to invent their own version of rock-paper-scissors. Too bad “woodchips-sunflower seeds-Mohawk’s butt hair” doesn’t have the same ring to it.

title: Delinquent Halloween
overview: TRICK OR TREAT! Hand over all your snacks and nobody gets hurt!

title: More Delinquent Dreams
overview: Regent’s insomnia leads to unexpected entertainment (but what else is new?).

title: Youthful Finale
overview: A role reversal inspires a look into the delinquents’ past. Look how much they’ve grown! D’awww!

title: Delinquent Hamsters
overview: Regent, Mohawk and Kohai get new digs in time for a new season. Time to take the delinquency up a notch!

title: Turf-Rubbing
overview: Why does the hamsters’ new place smell weird? It rubs them the wrong way, that’s for sure. Looks like they gotta set things right…

title: Open House
overview: Time for open house tours! How do delinquent hamsters decorate? Let’s find out.

title: New Character Debate
overview: The hamsters have new digs, but do they need a new character to really make this feel like Season 2? The delinquents discuss.

title: Who's "Honey?" - Part 1
overview: Gramps and Grams pay the delinquents a visit, and the delinquents have a LOT of questions. Perhaps too many to fit in just one episode…

title: Who's "Honey?" - Part 2
overview: Time to get to know Grams! She’s quite the inspiring hamster.

title: Where's Namippo?
overview: Are the hams forgetting something? Maybe Namippo? Or someone else? No, no, there’s no way…

title: Sofa Discourse
overview: How are the hams supposed to use a sofa, anyway? They should definitely start by claiming a spot, that’s for sure.

title: Drink Addicts
overview: No more escaping, huh? Time for the hams to take up a new coping mechanism.

title: Our Own Excalibur
overview: Samurai hamster Kiyomasa is still looking for a sword. Perhaps the delinquents can help him find his destined blade.

title: Humid Madness
overview: Kohai’s perm has gone haywire! Time to take drastic measures to tame the beast.

title: The Runaways
overview: The delinquents set their sights on a delicious looking book, but they’ll have to be sneaky to claim their prize.

title: Cushion Lazing
overview: The cushion strikes again and drains the hamsters of their usual rebellious energy. What would it take for them to break free from its dastardly clutches?

title: His Name
overview: Gramps stops by to play a game of tag… but wait. What’s his real name again? Does Gramps even remember?

title: Kohai's Tale
overview: Every good delinquent needs a war story or two. Kohai’s may just outshine them all. Time to get the dirt!

title: Shimazu & Kato's Epic Struggle
overview: When the cat’s away, the mice will play… or the hamsters will play, in this case. Same difference.

title: Summer Sofa
overview: Whoever finds the coolest spot on the sofa is the boss… too bad no one can decide where that spot actually is.

title: Polite Fighting
overview: Should the hams chill out on the cursing? How does one become a better delinquent, anyhow? The hamsters discuss.

title: Heated Tries
overview: Rugby is pretty cool. Do the hamsters even know the rules? Eh, whatever. It’ll be fine…

title: Jealousy
overview: There’s a new bird in town and Namippo isn’t happy about it.

title: Fighting off Sleep
overview: Are the hamsters actually night owls? Real delinquents don’t take naps!

title: Whistling Wish
overview: Regents wants to learn to whistle. Can Mohawk and Kohai teach him how?

title: Kinkuma's Challenge
overview: Kinkuma needs to go big or go home if he wants to pass his art class, but it’s hard for him to draw things he doesn’t care about. Maybe he should draw his hams!

title: Bro-o-lantern
overview: There’s an interloper in the hams’ midst, and it really gets their gourd.

title: Mild Delinquency
overview: Kohai is thinking of becoming a “mild” delinquent. Whatever that’s supposed to mean.

title: Phoenix
overview: Twee-Phoenix has an impressive name. Do they live up to it? Is it even their name? This is confusing…

title: Fall Feelings
overview: Mohawk falls for fall. Or he would, if it would actually get here... This conversation sure is taking a while…

title: Detective Regent
overview: Mohawk’s tissues are missing. Regent helps find them. He is an ace detective, you see.

title: Perfect Meditation
overview: The beacons are lit! Kiyomasa calls for aid!

title: Missing Snacks
overview: Mohawk and Regent have been robbed! There’s only one possible culprit… isn’t there? An investigation has begun!

title: Rivals on the Balcony
overview: The birds seem to be friendly all of a sudden… or does their cheerful mood conceal a darker truth? Dun dun DUN!

title: The Christmas Ultra-nice List
overview: Tensions are running high amongst the hams, but that’s nothing a little Chris Moose cheer can’t fix.

title: Old Ham Memories
overview: Grams and Gramps reminisce. They remember a lot from over the years, but will they remember they have an audience?

title: Secret Move Conference
overview: The delinquents need fancy finishing moves to use the next time they get in a fight. Time to brainstorm!

title: Visual Novel Delinquents
overview: Kohai takes a nap and has a really strange dream. Like… it’s weird as heck, y’all. What is even happening!?

title: Yoga Time
overview: All Regent wants is a little PEACE and QUIET! Too bad he lives with such rowdy hams… maybe he can calm them down a little?

title: Whistling Concert
overview: Mohawk finally has someone he can whistle with! Time to relax and enjoy the song.

title: Mouth-off Training
overview: The hams wax poetic on the subject of fruit, but which ones are their favs? The hams debate!

title: A Telling Look
overview: Kohai tries to improve his nonverbal communication skills, much to the other hams’ confusion.

title: Halloween Battle
overview: The Bro-o-Lantern returns! That means Halloween is almost here. Time for a costume competition to celebrate the spookiest of seasons!

title: Quotes for the Press
overview: Regent wants to hold a press conference, but what the heck are press conferences even for, anyway?

title: Present Presenting
overview: Merry Chris Moose! The hams present their presents to one another and celebrate another year together.

title: Delinquent Lingo 101
overview: Welcome to Delinquent Lingo 101 with your instructor, Kohai the delinquent hamster!

title: Winter Training
overview: The A/C doesn’t seem to be working properly, and the hams are feeling the heat… or the lack of it, to be specific. Why is it so COLD!?

title: Grand-1 Grand Prix
overview: The Grand-1 Grand Prix is underway, and the hams are off to the races to prove they’re the ultimate grandkid!

title: Hold Up Kohai
overview: Regent and Mohawk take their playtime very seriously, so while they goof off, Kohai will take some time for selfcare.

title: Lazy Techniques
overview: The delinquent hams teach Kiyomasa the fine art of doing nothing at all.

title: Worldwide Delinquents
overview: The siren song of fame is calling, but what will the delinquent hamsters have to do to become stars? Does Smartphone Bro hold the answers?

title: Voice Training
overview: A fight erupts… kind of. The hams are voice training and it’s confusing for Kohai. Hopefully they don’t yell too loudly and destroy their throats.

title: Looking for Rivals
overview: Life has been pretty lowkey lately, so Regent wants a new rival. But where the heck can a ham get a new rival on short notice?
